steps.title: Restrict the sample space
steps.content: Given that the participant is at least $10$ years old, only the $10$-$19$ and $20+$ columns count. Those columns contain $30+30=60$ participants.

steps.title: Find the conditional probability
steps.content: In those same columns, group A has $17+8=25$ participants. Therefore $$P(A\mid \text{age}\ge10)=\frac{25}{60}=\frac{5}{12}$$ The answer is B.
